title: Batch 2 Staging Plan — 5 Scenarios
deploy_condition: Batch 1 shows discovery/crawl progress (Day 3/7 checkpoints) + all pages score 90+ + Auditor SAFE

p1_auto_large_purchase.use_case: Auto / Large Purchase — secured vs unsecured comparison
p1_auto_large_purchase.demand: Autocomplete triggers for '30000 loan 7 percent'. Common auto loan query.
p1_auto_large_purchase.doorway: EXPECTED SAFE — fixed from 87 with deeper secured/unsecured content
p1_auto_large_purchase.unique_value: Dealer financing comparison, GAP insurance guidance, secured vs unsecured deep dive

p2_medical_dental.use_case: Medical/Dental — healthcare financing with average credit
p2_medical_dental.demand: Autocomplete: 'medical loan 10000'. Common healthcare financing query.
p2_medical_dental.unique_value: Medical financing alternatives (CareCredit, payment plans, HSA/FSA), hospital vs dental loan differences

p3_home_improvement.use_case: Home Improvement — good credit, adding home value
p3_home_improvement.demand: Autocomplete triggers for 'home improvement loan 15000'. Common homeowner query.
p3_home_improvement.unique_value: ROI of home improvements, HELOC vs personal loan comparison, tax deductibility of home improvement interest

p4_wedding_travel.use_case: Wedding/Life Event — discretionary borrowing, fair credit
p4_wedding_travel.unique_value: Discretionary borrowing warning — is financing a wedding worth it? Alternatives: smaller wedding, delayed honeymoon, family contributions

p5_very_high_apr_warning.use_case: High APR Warning — near-predatory lending education
p5_very_high_apr_warning.demand: Related to 'high interest loan 5000'. People search to understand worst-case.
p5_very_high_apr_warning.unique_value: Predatory lending red flags, APR caps by state, alternatives to 29%+ loans (credit union, secured, co-signer, payday loan alternatives), 'is this loan legal?' FAQ

batch_quality_target: ALL 5 pages must score 90+ AND pass doorway audit = SAFE before deploy
batch_will_deploy_when: Batch 1 shows at least discovery/crawl progress + Auditor approves
